calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-09-2022 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-05-2022 Continued To Nov-30-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion For Default Judgment Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-18-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this date being set for motion for default judgment prove-up hearing.

Dept. 514; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 11:01:58 a.m. and concluding at 11:17:06 a.m.

Plaintiff Bancal Management Corporation represented by Lisa K. Padilla, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Nicholas Jones not appearing.

KELLI SMITH is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff.
The following exhibits are MARKED/ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE:

Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 2 - Receipt and Rental Agreement signed Sep-01-2021

KELLI SMITH is examined by the Court.
The matter is submitted.

COURT FINDS:

1. The DOES in this matter were dismissed on Aug-17-2022
2. Default against Defendant Nicholas Jones entered on May-26-2022
3. Defendant has been personally served, has not responded, and does not claim interest in the property.
4. The Court has reviewed Plaintiff's Declaration and confirmed with Plaintiff that facts stated in it's declaration are true and correct.
5. Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence to establish that Defendant Nicholas Jones is not an original occupant pursuant to the Lease and has no other right to maintain exclusive possession of the Premises located at 2442 Polk Street, San Francisco, CA 94115.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Bancal management Corporation, and against Defendant Nicholas Jones as follows:

Plaintiff is awarded costs of suit incurred in the sum of $637.07.
Proposed judgment signed as modified.
